channel.title: osx on Julian Xhokaxhiu's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in osx on Julian Xhokaxhiu's Blog

item.title: jQuery iTunes Store Search
item.description: Hi, today i would like you to present this little plugin i’ve made for you, and I’m of course talking about jQuery iTunes Store Search Plugin.

item.title: Fix NTFS-3G boot message warning on OS X Lion/Mountain Lion
item.description: Hi, today i’m sharing with you a little know-how i got by myself regarding an annoying error that maybe you faced yourself when you tryed to install NTFS-3G over Mac OS X Lion 10.
